title: Who is Maurice Shelmon aka Ant Jefe? No Jumper YouTuber and podcaster faces felony murder charge after LAPD arrest
summary_full: Maurice Shelmon, also known as Ant Jefe, was reportedly arrested by the LAPD on a felony murder charge, according to TMZ. The No Jumper podcaster and rapper became known through YouTube videos, music, and podcast appearances. Following the arrest news, No Jumper hosts reacted during a livestream and expressed shock while speaking about his recent online success and growing platform.
